# **Bug Report: \#Bug\_001**

| Bug ID | Bug\_001 |
| :---- | :---- |
| Tester | Sangeetha |
| Date (submitted) | 03/02/2026 |
| Title | Incorrect date format  |
| **Bug Description** |  |
| URL | https://codebeautify.org/generate-random-date |
| Summary | When "Year Date Month hh:mm:ss"format is selected from the “Data output Format” ,the dates are generated in “Year Month Date” format |
| Screenshot | Attached |
| Platform | Browser |
| Browser | Chrome  |
| **Administrative** |  |
| Assigned To |  |
| Assigned At |  |
| Priority | Medium |
| Severity | Medium |

**Additional Notes:**

* **Step-by-step Description:**

  1\. Go to the page Random Data generator

  2.Locate the label "Date Output Format?" 

  3.Click the dropdown and select "Year Date Month hh:mm:ss"

  4.Enter the start date and end date in the given  input field.


* **Screenshots:**  
  ![][image1]  
    
* **Result \- Should:** The date and time should be displayed at the output field in "Year Date Month hh:mm:ss"format   
* **Result \- Is:** “The outfield it is displayed as Year Month Date hh:mm:ss”

# **Bug Report: \#Bug\_002**

| Bug ID | Bug\_002 |
| :---- | :---- |
| Tester | Sangeetha |
| Date (submitted) | 03/02/2026 |
| Title | Misspelled months |
| **Bug Description** |  |
| URL | https://codebeautify.org/generate-random-date |
| Summary | When “YY month d” is entered in the custom date field, the output displays some of the months misspelled . |
| Screenshot | Attached |
| Platform | Browser |
| Browser | Chrome  |
| **Administrative** |  |
| Assigned To |  |
| Assigned At |  |
| Priority | HIgh |
| Severity | High |

**Additional Notes:**

* **Step-by-step Description:**

		1\. Go to the page Random Data generator  
2.Select "custom data format" from the "Data output generator" drop down   
3.Clear any default value currently in the field.  
4.Type in the date format and observe if it is allowed to enter and get displayed .  
5.Enter the start date and end date in the given  input field.

* **Screenshots:**

			  
			![][image2]

* **Result \- Should:** It should allow to enter the data and should display date in the given format.  
    
* **Result \- Is:** “It allow to enter the data and date is displayed in the correct format but some of the months are spelled incorrectly(December,october,March,November,August)

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image2]: <data:image/png;base64,>
